name: Goodman Group
analysis: GMG's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 14% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$32.0400. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$32.0600, stop A$30.1257, target A$37.8629 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
